evidence_spans.span: The score function is the derivative of the log-likelihood with respect to the parameter
At an interior differentiable optimum, an MLE candidate satisfies the score equation \(s(\theta)=0\).

results.rationale: The MLE estimator is defined as the argmax of the log-likelihood, and the score function (derivative of log-likelihood) provides the condition for an interior optimum via the score equation, thus the MLE estimator formalizes the condition that the score function must be zero.
